Configuration of 64 Channels of Navel Nāḍī Chakra

# Configuration of 64 Channels of Navel Nāḍī Chakra

### Which are the 12 channels that correspond to the 12 zodiac signs?

[](https://substack.com/@tseringdorji)

![Tsering Dorji's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!VB0T!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Faedf658f-bb6c-4511-9227-fcdbd4e7c7bd_768x773.jpeg)

Aug 06, 2023

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!9PAp!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F67954bf9-90fc-410a-b92f-46cfad7e3690_691x233.png)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!9PAp!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F67954bf9-90fc-410a-b92f-46cfad7e3690_691x233.png)

Drawing of Navel Nadi chakra and its twelve Lagana or houses (Zodiac signs)

The above diagram of the navel nāḍī chakra was drawn by Beri Khyentse Rinpoche (1890-1946). He said that he copied this diagram from the original illustration of the nāḍī system drawn by the 15th Karmapa and Jamgon Lodoe Thaye.

### Configuration

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

- The large circle in the centre is the central channel, which is
  located in the navel region.

- From the central channel at the navel, four primary channels branch
  off to the right and left, connected to the right Roma channel and the
  left Kyangma channel.

- The Sun and Moon move through the right and left channels, and Rahu
  (eclipse) moves through the central channel.

- These four primary channels divide into three channels each, making
  twelve channels. These twelve secondary channels correspond to the
  twelve houses or signs of the zodiac. Six channels on the right
  correspond to the six odd signs (Taurus, Cancer, Virgo, Scorpio,
  Capricorn and Pisces). Six channels on the left are the six even signs
  (Aries, Gemini, Leo, Libra, Sagittarius and Aquarius).

- Finally, the twelve secondary channels are divided into five channels
  each, making sixty channels.

- What are the sixty-four channels?

  4 primary channels + 60 tertiary channels (outer channel tips).
